recommendations.title: PG: Psycho Goreman
recommendations.overview: Siblings Mimi and Luke unwittingly resurrect an ancient alien overlord. Using a magical amulet, they force the monster to obey their childish whims, and accidentally attract a rogues’ gallery of intergalactic assassins to small-town suburbia.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/94
recommendations.overview: After the discovery of a mysterious VHS tape, a brutish police SWAT team launches a high-intensity raid on a remote warehouse, only to discover a sinister cult compound whose collection of pre-recorded material uncovers a nightmarish conspiracy.
recommendations.director: Simon Barrett, Steven Kostanski, Chloe Okuno, Timo Tjahjanto, Jennifer Reeder, Ryan Prows

recommendations.title: The Void
recommendations.overview: In the middle of a routine patrol, officer Daniel Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted stretch of road. He rushes the young man to a nearby rural hospital staffed by a skeleton crew, only to discover that patients and per

recommendations.title: Pumpkin
recommendations.overview: Carolyn's sorority sisters set their sights on the Sorority of the Year award and coaching challenged athletes is their ticket to the trophy. But when the queen of formals finds herself mentoring Pumpkin, a disabled athlete, their two worlds collide.

recommendations.title: The House on Sorority Row
recommendations.overview: When the senior sorority sisters of Theta Pi decide to do in their demented house mother, someone seeks revenge, and begins a night of terror and madness.

recommendations.title: ABCs of Death 2
recommendations.overview: Taking all that was great from the first instalment, the movie aims to be a wilder, leaner, faster-paced and even more entertaining anthology this time around, with a new crop of award-winning, visionary filmmakers from around the globe.
recommendations.director: Jen Soska, Robert Morgan, Julian Barratt, Juan Martínez Moreno, Hajime Ohata, Bruno Samper, Jim Hosking, Rodney Ascher, Jerome Sable, Marvin Kren, Todd Rohal, Sôichi Umezawa, Chris Nash, Alexandre Bustillo, Alejandro Brugués, Dennison Ramalho, Wolfgang Matzl, Aharon Keshales, Julian Gilbey, Kristina Buožytė, Robert Boocheck, E.L. Katz, Julien Maury, Larry Fessenden, Bill Plympton, Lancelot Oduwa Imasuen, Sylvia Soska, Steven Kostanski, Erik Matti, Vincenzo Natali, Navot Papushado

recommendations.title: Black Christmas
recommendations.overview: As the residents of the Pi Kappa Sigma sorority house prepare for the festive season, a stranger begins to harass them with a series of obscene phone calls.

recommendations.title: Leprechaun
recommendations.overview: A demonic leprechaun terrorizes a group of young people whom he believes stole his gold.

recommendations.title: Sorority House Massacre
recommendations.overview: Upon joining a sorority, Beth is plagued by nightmares of a knife-wielding killer, when her past comes back to haunt her.

recommendations.title: Black Christmas
recommendations.overview: As the residents of sorority house Pi Kappa Sigma prepare for the festive season, a stranger begins a series of obscene phone calls with dubious intentions...
